{{Quote|We have a grant for rifle development and another to reverse engineer a Gungan Assault Cannon.|A scientist, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:QS">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Question Scientists|Lok}}</ref>}}
The '''Gungan assault cannon''' was a powerful assault weapon produced by the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. The assault cannon was a fusion of organically-grown technology coupled with standard electronic components.<ref name="Hasbro" />

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] scientists at a secret [[Imperial Research Facility (Lok)|Imperial Research Facility]] on the planet [[Lok/Legends|Lok]] had received a grant to reverse engineer a Gungan assault cannon.<ref name="SWG:QS" />
